stemHtml: What is the minimum flight altitude for an IFR flight over mountainous area?

options.a: A level that is at least 600 m (2000 ft) above the highest obstacle located within 8 km of the aircraft`s estimated position.
options.b: A level that is at least 600 m (2000 ft) above the highest obstacle located within 25 NM of the aircraft`s estimated position.
options.c: A level that is at least 600 m (2000 ft) above the highest obstacle located within 8 NM of the aircraft`s estimated position.
options.d: A level that is at least 300 m (1000) ft above the highest obstacle located within 8 km of the aircraft’s estimated position.
